elements.title: ancient Israelite architecture
elements.contents: ... that following the Assyrians' conquest of the Kingdom of Israel, they incorporated aspects of ancient Israelite architecture (example pictured) into their own constructions in Nineveh?

elements.title: a fantasy novel series about cats

elements.title: Maurille de Sombreuil
elements.contents: ... that, according to legend, Maurille de Sombreuil saved her father's life during the September Massacres by drinking a glass of blood?

elements.title: North Yonge subway extension

elements.title: Panas Saksahansky

elements.title: Ainsworth Rand Spofford
